brief_summary: Two-column diagnosis ledger. Left (coral solid borders, 'three valid diagnoses'): bottom-out hardness mismatch, initial-force fatigue, unusual stock weight in beloved housing. Right (bordeaux dashed borders, 'three wrong diagnoses'): wanting a different sound, hoping to fix scratch, buying full board untested. Each row has a one-line corrective action.
data_sources: spring-swaps-explained.mdx § 'When the swap is the right answer' — 'The first is bottom-out hardness mismatch ... The second is initial-force fatigue ... The third is an unusual stock weight on a switch the builder otherwise loves'

spring-swaps-explained.mdx § 'When the swap is the wrong answer' — 'The clearest wrong answer is "I want this switch to sound different" ... The second wrong answer is "this switch feels scratchy and maybe a different spring will fix it" ... The third wrong answer ... is swapping springs across a full board without testing on a few switches first.'
